strategies: Lead every ad with a pain-point hook — it dominates 38–44% of 30-day survivors.
Test 5–8 creative variants per product; winners run Advantage+ at scale.
Use human face in first frame — TikTok data shows 20–30% higher CTR.
Place CTA at 75–80% through video — click spikes at seconds 15–20.
Mirror top July winners: cooling, travel, beauty, and home demo products.
summary: Right now, the strongest e-commerce ads combine a tight problem-state hook delivered by a real person in the first 2–3 seconds with a visible product demo that resolves the problem before the viewer can scroll away. Beauty and personal care dominate TikTok Shop GMV (42%+), while home gadgets, summer travel products, and cooling accessories are seeing the heaviest Meta and TikTok spend this week in July. Longevity-proven ad patterns — outcome-first UGC on Meta, GRWM and before/after demos on TikTok — are consistently outlasting polished brand creative, confirming authenticity as the primary performance lever in 2026.
